title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China revealed JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot with a split AI brain architecture for real-time processing. Vietnam introduced the Dyno and VR-H3 humanoid robots for security, homes, factories, and service roles. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T platform with Unitree H2 and Jetson Thor for researchers, featuring over 2000 teraflops of onboard AI compute.
